title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 197.355 - Certificate required before funds may be appropriated
text:
197.355.  Certificate required before funds may be appropriated. — The legislature may not appropriate any money for capital expenditures for health care facilities until a certificate of need has been issued for such expenditures.
(L. 1979 H.B. 222 § 12) 
Effective 10-1-80
